input:
Senior Frontend Engineer at Vercel (Berlin / hybrid)

About us
Vercel is the frontend cloud platform behind Next.js. We're hiring across product and infrastructure.

Tech stack:
- TypeScript
- Next.js
- React
- Tailwind CSS
- tRPC
- PostgreSQL

What you'll do:
- Own a slice of the dashboard from design to production
- Mentor 1-2 mid-level engineers
- Drive performance work across the frontend

Requirements:
- 6+ years building React apps in production
- Strong TypeScript fundamentals
- Experience leading technical projects

Nice to have:
- Open source contributions
- Experience with Next.js App Router

Compensation: €90-115k base.
